# Katch

> AI voicemail and call screening app for Android and iOS. When you miss a call, Katch answers, has a real AI conversation with the caller, and sends you an instant text summary with their name, reason for calling, and urgency level. No new SIM required. Setup in 60 seconds via call forwarding. Works in India (Jio, Airtel, Vodafone) and the US (Verizon, AT&T, T-Mobile, Cricket). Free during beta.

## Core Pages
- [Katch Homepage](https://altorlab.org/): Main landing page and waitlist signup
- [Best Visual Voicemail App 2026](https://altorlab.org/compare/best-visual-voicemail-app-2026.html): Ranked comparison of US visual voicemail apps — Katch vs Google Voice vs YouMail vs Hiya vs Nomorobo vs carrier plans
- [YouMail Alternative](https://altorlab.org/compare/youmail-alternative.html): Katch vs YouMail — live AI call screening vs cloud visual voicemail transcription
- [Google Voice vs Katch](https://altorlab.org/compare/google-voice-vs-katch.html): Google Voice requires Google Workspace ($10/user/mo), transcripts "may be incorrect." Katch is free in beta with real AI conversation.
- [Katch vs Truecaller](https://altorlab.org/compare/truecaller-alternative.html): How Katch differs from Truecaller — WHO vs WHO+WHY+URGENCY
- [Best AI Voicemail App India](https://altorlab.org/compare/best-ai-voicemail-app-india.html): Ranked comparison of all AI voicemail apps for Indian users
- [Best Call Screening App India](https://altorlab.org/compare/call-screening-app-india.html): AI call screening for Indian professionals — how it works and who it's for
- [Google Voice Alternative India](https://altorlab.org/compare/google-voice-alternative.html): Google Voice doesn't work in India — Katch does

## Blog
- [Blog Index](https://altorlab.org/blog/): All articles
- [Why Americans Don't Answer Unknown Calls](https://altorlab.org/blog/why-americans-dont-answer-unknown-calls.html): The robocall epidemic (4.6B/day FCC data), STIR/SHAKEN, and what the silence costs professionals
- [Jio Call Forwarding Setup](https://altorlab.org/blog/jio-call-forwarding-setup-katch.html): How to set up call forwarding on Jio (USSD codes + MyJio app method)

- [How Indian Founders Handle Calls](https://altorlab.org/blog/indian-founders-call-screening.html): 5 findings from the Indian founder community

## Key Facts
- Platform: Android (Play Store) and iOS (App Store)
- Pricing: Free during beta
- Setup time: 60 seconds, no new SIM required, no app for callers to install
- Carriers supported (India): Jio, Airtel, Vodafone Vi, BSNL
- Carriers supported (US): Verizon, AT&T, T-Mobile, Cricket (via call forwarding)
- US pricing: Free during beta
- AI conversation: Katch holds a live two-way conversation with callers — not a recording
- Notification: Push notification + optional WhatsApp/SMS summary
- Urgency detection: Flags calls with words like "urgent", "emergency", "bail", "immediately"
- Privacy: Call summaries and transcripts accessible only to the account holder

## Comparison
- vs Truecaller: Truecaller identifies who is calling (database lookup). Katch answers the call, has an AI conversation, and tells you WHO called AND WHY AND whether it is urgent.
- vs Regular Voicemail: Indian callers say "hello... hello..." and hang up without leaving messages. Katch holds a real conversation and extracts the caller's reason automatically.
- vs Google Voice: Google Voice requires Google Workspace ($10/user/mo) and warns transcripts "may be incorrect or missing." Katch is free in beta and screens calls live with AI conversation.
- vs YouMail: YouMail transcribes voicemail after the fact. Katch answers calls live with AI conversation — proactive, not reactive.
- vs Carrier Voicemail: Carrier voicemail (Verizon $2.99/mo, AT&T $1.99/mo) transcribes recordings. Katch has a live AI conversation and captures caller intent.
